profile.name: Aster
profile.title: Frontend Engineer
profile.summary: Experienced in building high-concurrency, reusable frontend architecture from 0 to 1. Deep expertise in the Vue ecosystem with fast switching between Vue and React for team collaboration. Skilled at integrating AI into frontend engineering and product UX, with strong practice in delivery efficiency and intelligent experiences. Led complex systems across smart campus, AI sports, fintech, and connected vehicles, with solid experience in large-scale data visualization, real-time interaction, and LLM frontend integration — with a framework-agnostic approach to architecture design.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.summary: Bilingual online resume · AI chat & performance tuning
projects.introduction: A React-based portfolio and online resume site with Chinese/English switching, featuring project showcases, experience, skills, and hobby detail pages. Includes an AI chat assistant that answers visitor questions from resume context, with systematic first-paint and bundle-size optimization.
responsibilities: Designed site architecture with React + TypeScript + Vite, building multi-layer routing for home, project list/detail, and hobby pages
Integrated DeepSeek API for AI chat assistant with resume context Q&A, improving answer accuracy through prompt optimization
Implemented Three.js + React Three Fiber for 3D orbital planet animation with dynamic rendering density switching via ResizeObserver
Built mouse-following effects with Framer Motion using useMotionValue + useSpring + useTransform, supporting staggered entrance animations and reduced motion accessibility
Applied performance optimization strategies: route lazy loading, component on-demand mounting, build chunking with React.lazy and Suspense
Set up Tailwind CSS theme system for bilingual Chinese/English switching
outcomes: Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop; hobby modules feature immersive photography gallery, reading shelf, hiking records, and music player
Main app chunk compressed to ~21KB, CSS optimized by Tailwind with Gzip only 15.65 KB
AI chat assistant supports multi-turn conversations for enhanced visitor engagement
Complete TypeScript type definitions ensure project maintainability

projects.title: Lezhixing Smart Campus
projects.summary: K12 AI smart campus platform · safety, dorms, home-school
projects.company: Hangzhou Lezhixing Education Technology Co., Ltd.
projects.introduction: AI-driven K12 smart campus management platform covering safety, dorm management, mental health, and home-school communication. Uses face recognition, behavior analysis, and AI alerts for proactive campus safety, processing over 1 million behavioral records daily.
responsibilities: Built a reusable Ant Design business component library including trajectory heatmaps, behavior analysis cards, alert lists, and data dashboard components. Established component documentation and usage standards
Designed JSON Schema-based dynamic form engine supporting automatic form generation for academic, dorm management, and visitor booking scenarios
Integrated AI facial recognition and behavior analysis modules with real-time data streaming, enabling alert push and visualization
Established frontend engineering system with code linting, CI/CD pipeline to ensure team collaboration efficiency
outcomes: Canvas rendering optimization and virtual scrolling improved first screen load speed by ~30%, supporting smooth rendering of millions of daily data records
Data slicing and preloading strategies improved page switching experience by ~40%
Component library reuse rate reached 60%+, improving new feature development efficiency by ~30%
Established frontend monitoring system for error tracking and performance monitoring, improving issue location efficiency by ~50%

projects.title: Smart Campus Platform / Lingkang Yuedong
projects.summary: Fitness health management & smart sports ecosystem · multi-end mini programs
projects.company: Jiangsu Lingkang Electronics Development Co., Ltd. (Hangzhou Branch)
projects.introduction: National fitness health management and smart sports ecosystem platform integrating fitness testing, classes, events, and administration. Supports real-time collection and analysis of large-scale motion data with personalized exercise guidance.
responsibilities: Designed unified authentication and permission management system, integrating CAS single sign-on for cross-system access with data security
Led Bluetooth device access layer design, compatible with Bluetooth 4.0 and new AI motion capture devices for real-time data collection
Built Uni-app cross-end component library and modular architecture, establishing component development standards to promote code reuse
Integrated AI motion recognition algorithm for rope skipping counting and running posture analysis
outcomes: Real-time motion data collection and AI analysis generate personalized exercise prescriptions, upgrading data report interaction experience
Parameterized configuration system supports third-party partners to customize mini programs quickly, reducing delivery cycle by ~30%
Component reuse rate improved to 60%+, team development efficiency improved by ~25%
Bluetooth connection stability reached 95%+, data transmission latency controlled within acceptable range

projects.title: Fitness Master
projects.summary: AI vision sports education · teach, train, assess loop
projects.introduction: AI sports education platform based on computer vision. Gamifies motion through intelligent behavior analysis, supporting rope skipping, running, and exam-oriented training in a teach–train–assess closed loop.
responsibilities: Designed and delivered a highly reusable component library, establishing development standards and code review mechanisms to promote component standardization and documentation
Architected data visualization dashboard system supporting real-time sports event data display, fitness test analysis, and AI motion recognition monitoring
Integrated AI image recognition module for real-time counting and posture analysis of rope skipping, running and other special training
Built frontend performance monitoring system for key metrics tracking and error alerts
outcomes: Resource cleanup, caching strategies, and code splitting improved platform performance by ~25%, with first screen load time optimized
Optimized Canvas rendering pipeline, AI motion recognition frame rate stabilized above 30fps
Component library covers ~70% of business scenarios, code reuse rate reached 50%+, reducing requirement delivery cycle by ~20%
Established frontend monitoring system, improving online issue detection efficiency by ~50%

projects.title: Palm Silver Insurance Admin
projects.summary: Bancassurance team platform · WeCom integration & product rules
projects.company: Hangzhou Weiyi Information Technology Co., Ltd.
projects.introduction: Management platform for bancassurance teams with permissions, online support, audit logs, deep WeCom integration, and complex insurance product combination calculations.
responsibilities: Designed RBAC-based permission management system, integrated WeCom scan login for access control and data isolation
Designed data search, filtering, and audit trail system supporting complex query conditions and data traceability
Designed and integrated online customer service module with real-time messaging, agent assignment, and session management
Led frontend implementation of insurance product combination calculation engine supporting product rule configuration and premium calculation
outcomes: Established data visualization system for real-time business data analysis and visual reports to support management decisions
Code splitting, lazy loading, and resource compression reduced bundle size by ~30%, improving first screen load speed by ~25%
Permission system covers core business scenarios with effective data security
Online customer service module improved user issue response efficiency

projects.title: Palm Finance
projects.summary: Cross-end fintech platform · Taro mini program + H5
projects.company: Hangzhou Weiyi Information Technology Co., Ltd.
projects.introduction: Cross-end service platform for loan brokers and clients, supporting mini programs (broker side) and H5 (client side) with fast iteration, high stability, and precise behavioral analytics.
responsibilities: Led technology selection, introduced Taro framework for cross-end development supporting mini programs (broker side) and H5 (client side)
Designed and built cross-end compatibility component library to resolve Vant component styling and interaction differences on H5
Integrated Alibaba Cloud captcha and data tracking system for API security protection and user behavior tracking
Optimized WeChat mini program performance with subpackage loading and lazy loading strategies
outcomes: Alibaba Cloud captcha and request rate limiting effectively prevented malicious API attacks
Established data tracking system for user behavior analysis to support product decisions
Subpackage and lazy loading strategies improved core page load speed by ~35%, reducing mini program bundle size by ~30%
Component library covers ~70% of business scenarios, reducing cross-end compatibility issues

projects.title: Taxi Fleet Comprehensive Platform
projects.summary: Traffic safety monitoring · live dashboard & route replay
projects.company: Hangzhou Cherries Intelligence Technology Co., Ltd.
projects.introduction: Traffic safety monitoring platform built on in-house vehicle hardware, providing real-time vehicle tracking, route replay, geofencing, and heatmap analysis.
responsibilities: Independently developed core frontend modules including real-time monitoring dashboard, vehicle trajectory replay, driver information management, and bonus distribution system
Wrapped AMap SDK for real-time vehicle positioning, trajectory tracking, geofencing, and optimized map rendering performance
Integrated Tencent TcPlayer SDK for real-time vehicle video monitoring and historical video playback
Designed complex table component supporting large data filtering, sorting, and search
outcomes: Optimized table filtering and search logic with virtual scrolling, improving query efficiency by ~40%
UI system optimization with design standards improved interaction consistency
Map rendering performance optimized to support multiple vehicles online simultaneously
Video streaming playback stable, meeting real-time monitoring requirements

projects.title: Data Crawling & Visualization System
projects.summary: Judicial auction & real estate data crawling · visualization & management
projects.introduction: Built a scheduled data crawling and integration system for judicial auctions, real estate transactions, and other public data. Developed supporting data visualization platform and admin management system to support legal business data analysis and decision-making.
responsibilities: Designed scalable crawler task scheduling system supporting multi-site, multi-task parallel execution
Built proxy pool mechanism with automatic proxy rotation and health detection
Implemented logging monitoring and retry mechanism for data integrity and traceability
Developed data visualization platform using ECharts for statistics, trend analysis, and keyword alerts
Built task management backend with crawler configuration, monitoring dashboard, and alert system
outcomes: Crawler task scheduling and proxy pool mechanism supporting multiple data sources
Logging and retry mechanism improved data crawling stability to 90%+
Incremental data update strategy with Excel/CSV export support
Data traceability system supporting source tracking and version management
Visualization platform helps lawyers quickly locate target assets, improving data retrieval efficiency ~40%

projects.title: 16HOUR News Platform
projects.summary: Lifestyle news · WebView app & campaign H5
projects.company: Chengdu Tuoyuan Culture Communication Co., Ltd.
projects.introduction: Lifestyle news platform covering international, domestic, and local topics with high-frequency campaign operations and multi-end delivery.
responsibilities: Responsible for WebView App daily iteration development and large-scale marketing campaign H5 page development
Led multi-end adaptation and compatibility solution design, solving iOS/Android version and browser compatibility issues
Designed rich text editor supporting mixed text/image layout, video embedding, and style customization
Optimized page loading performance with resource preloading, lazy loading, and caching strategies
outcomes: Campaign landing page performance optimized with reduced first screen load time and improved interaction smoothness
Multi-end compatibility issues significantly reduced, lowering user complaint rate
Rich text editor with complete features supporting multiple content formats, improving content production efficiency
Successfully supported multiple large-scale marketing campaigns with stable system operation

experience.company: Jiangsu Lingkang Electronics Development Co., Ltd. (Hangzhou Branch)
highlights: Led frontend architecture and core development across admin, Pad, mini programs, and third-party mini program delivery
Owned performance optimization strategy; introduced AI-assisted code review and component generation to improve team velocity
Led frontend stack selection and engineering setup; built and maintained component library and modular architecture
Owned frontend architecture and stack selection for campus sports informatization systems (Web/App)
Built shared component and utility libraries, reducing duplicate work ~30%
Established frontend development standards and led code reviews

experience.company: Hangzhou Weiyi Information Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Independently owned frontend architecture and development of Palm Silver Insurance and Palm Finance from 0 to 1
Developed and maintained insurance admin platform, workplace mobile app, and related systems
Explored LLM API integration in insurance/fintech scenarios and cross-end compatibility solutions
Hosted tech talks on Taro and micro-frontends to foster team learning culture

highlights: Delivered WebView app and large-scale campaign H5 for millions of users

Participated in requirement planning and frontend architecture design for fast campaign releases

quote.text: Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
quote.author: Harold Abelson
